data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Expected to Rise While Silver Faces Bearish Sentiment
data.description: Gold prices are anticipated to continue their upward trend, although there is a divergence in bullish sentiment near the current price level. According to Jin10, silver put options have increased bets on a downward movement, shifting from last week's single-point explosion to a broader range layout.

data.title: Apple's MacBook Neo Sees Strong Demand, Supply Chain Adjustments Underway
data.description: Apple's newly launched budget-friendly MacBook Neo has achieved early success in the consumer market, according to Jin10. Reports indicate that the initial batch of products has sold out, prompting Apple to urgently increase orders with suppliers Hon Hai and Quanta. The MacBook Neo, which has been available globally since March 11, is priced at $599, with a starting price of 4,599 yuan in China. Delivery times for the laptop have now extended to May. Apple has also raised its sales forecast for the MacBook Neo from 7 million units to 10 million units. However, the inventory of the A18 Pro chip used in the MacBook Neo has become a key constraint on the production capacity of this laptop.

data.title: Ed Yardeni: Geopolitical Tensions Unlikely to Derail Stocks
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Ed Yardeni has expressed that recent geopolitical tensions are unlikely to negatively impact the stock market. Yardeni believes these tensions often present buying opportunities for investors. He noted that the stock market's low on March 30 likely marked the bottom of the recent pullback. Yardeni anticipates that upcoming earnings reports will confirm the resilience of both the economy and corporate profits.

data.title: Binance Alpha: The minimum requirement to claim the blind box airdrop is 235 points, and applying will consume 15 points.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available for collection starting today at 9:00 AM (UTC). This airdrop utilizes the upgraded Alpha Box model, with the pool containing tokens from multiple projects. Users holding at least 235 Binance Alpha Points can claim a reward on a first-come, first-served basis, with each claim requiring 15 points. The airdrop offers three tiers: Common (80%), Rare (15%), and Super Rare (5%), with rewards distributed proportionally. If the reward pool is not fully allocated, the points threshold will decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes.

data.title: Binance Launches April Streaming Season with Earnings Opportunities
data.description:
Binance announced on X the commencement of its April Streaming Season, offering participants the chance to earn substantial rewards. The event, part of the Binance Square initiative, encourages users to engage in live streaming activities with the potential to earn up to 20,000 U per month. This initiative aims to attract both new and experienced streamers to participate actively in the platform's offerings.

The April Streaming Season presents several opportunities for participants to maximize their earnings. Streamers can compete on leaderboards, with top performers having the potential to earn up to 20,000 U monthly. Additionally, newcomers to the streaming platform are eligible for special rewards during their first broadcast, with bonuses reaching up to 188 U. Furthermore, participants who introduce others to the platform and facilitate their first transaction can earn an additional 8.8 U per person. This structured approach is designed to incentivize participation and reward active engagement within the Binance community.

data.title: Stablecoin Supply on HyperLiquid Reaches Record High
data.description: Stablecoin supply on HyperLiquid has reached a new peak, according to ASXN data reported by BlockBeats on April 14. Since February, the supply of stablecoins on the platform has been steadily increasing, reaching a total of $1.78 billion today. Of this amount, USDC accounts for $1.44 billion.

data.title: Pendle Launches DeFi Yield Protocol Saturn's RWA Products
data.description: Pendle has announced the launch of its DeFi yield protocol Saturn's RWA products, USDat and sUSDat, both set to mature on August 27, 2026. According to Foresight News, Saturn has officially gone live on the mainnet, marking the end of its private testing phase. Companies such as Flowdesk and Galaxy have collectively deposited $10 million. The stablecoin USDat is built on M0, with Galaxy, Securitize, and Clear Street serving as operational partners.

data.title: U.S. and Iran Consider Extending Ceasefire Amid Naval Blockade
data.description: The United States and Iran are contemplating further negotiations to prolong their ceasefire, as U.S. President Donald Trump continues to enforce a naval blockade. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing diplomatic efforts between the two nations. The discussions aim to maintain stability in the region, with both sides seeking to avoid escalation. The naval blockade, initiated by President Trump, is part of a broader strategy to exert pressure on Iran while diplomatic channels remain open. The situation remains tense, with international observers closely monitoring developments.

data.title: Binance to Upgrade Portfolio Margin Account USDⓈ-M Conditional Order Service
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a maintenance upgrade is scheduled for the Portfolio Margin Account USDⓈ-M conditional order service on 2026-04-28. This upgrade aims to enhance system performance and improve user experience, with the maintenance expected to last for eight hours. The upgrade will specifically affect USDⓈ-M conditional orders, while COIN-M conditional orders will remain unaffected. During the maintenance period, pre-placed USDⓈ-M conditional orders will continue to trigger normally. However, users may experience delays, temporary unavailability for queries, or inconsistencies in the Order History page.

Binance advises users to upgrade their Binance App to version v3.12 or later to ensure continued support for order placement after the maintenance. Older versions of the app will no longer support USDⓈ-M conditional order placements, and such orders will be rejected. Additionally, existing API endpoints for Binance Portfolio Margin USDⓈ-M conditional orders will be retired and replaced with new endpoints. API users are encouraged to migrate promptly to avoid trading interruptions. Users are advised to review and manage their conditional orders prior to the maintenance and closely monitor their orders during the maintenance window. If users experience missing triggered conditional orders in Order History, they are encouraged to contact Binance Customer Support for assistance.

data.title: Spain's March Harmonized CPI Final Rate at 3.4%
data.description: Spain's harmonized consumer price index (CPI) for March recorded a final annual rate of 3.4%, surpassing the anticipated 3.3% and matching the previous value of 3.30%. According to Jin10, this data reflects the inflationary trends observed in the Spanish economy during the specified period.

data.title: Binance Life's market capitalization briefly surpassed $250 million, surging over 28% intraday.
data.description: According to GMGN data, Binance Life's market capitalization briefly exceeded $250 million, continuing its rebound to a new high, currently at $247 million, with a daily increase of over 28%.

data.title: Iran's Oil Sales Remain Strong Amid Military Conflict
data.description:
Iran's Oil Minister Mohsen Paknejad announced on April 14 that the country's oil sales have been robust since the onset of military conflicts with the United States and Israel. According to BlockBeats, a portion of the revenue generated will be allocated to repairing industrial damage caused by wartime attacks.

Paknejad highlighted that Iranian oil industry workers have maintained operations at various facilities throughout the conflict, ensuring that oil exports have not been interrupted, even for a single day. This includes key export hubs such as Kharg Island.

data.title: Trump's AI-Generated Image Sparks Backlash from Religious Right
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump has sparked controversy by releasing an AI-generated image depicting himself as Jesus Christ. According to BlockBeats, this move has angered the religious right, marking the strongest backlash from Catholic and evangelical supporters since his return to the White House.

John Yep, CEO of the nonprofit organization 'Catholics for Catholics,' expressed confusion over the incident. He noted that Catholics have overwhelmingly supported Trump, and this act of disrespect towards their faith has left them bewildered. The organization has previously hosted religious events at Trump's Mar-a-Lago estate and maintained close ties with his administration.

Despite initial skepticism, conservative Christians have consistently backed Trump through two impeachments and three elections. Trump has fulfilled campaign promises to them, including nominating Supreme Court justices who helped overturn the Roe v. Wade decision. However, for many Christian leaders, the image posted by Trump on Truth Social, along with his sharp criticism of Pope Leo XIV, has crossed a line.

data.title: PA Beacon Launches to Enhance Polymarket Insights
data.description:
PA Beacon, a market prediction tracking tool, has officially launched, offering smart money observation and real-time alerts for Polymarket. According to PANews, PA Beacon organizes decentralized prediction market fund activities into a continuous signal stream through candidate pool screening, address profiling, leaderboard generation, and minute-level monitoring. It is now in public operation.

PA Beacon currently features four smart money leaderboards: Small Strong List, Steady Profit List, Active Alpha List, and High Win Rate List, which update every six hours. Additionally, it operates two minute-level monitoring lines, including a Watchlist for key addresses and a 'Large Radar' for transactions over $20,000, covering sectors such as sports, politics, geopolitics, and esports.

data.title: Swedish Central Bank Deputy Governor Discusses Inflation Impact
data.description: Swedish Central Bank Deputy Governor Bunge stated that the impact on inflation depends on the duration of the war, the speed of production recovery in the region, and the response of businesses and households to the situation. According to Jin10, these factors will play a crucial role in determining the inflationary pressures faced by the economy.

data.title: Sen. Tillis to Release Draft Clarity Act Language on Stablecoin Yield
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis announced plans to unveil draft language for the Clarity Act this week, aiming to clarify whether cryptocurrency firms can offer yield on idle stablecoin balances. According to NS3.AI, the proposal has been reviewed by representatives from both the banking and cryptocurrency sectors, but has faced criticism from banks, though the specific source of the pushback remains undisclosed. The bill is required to pass through the Senate Banking Committee and be reconciled with the Senate Agriculture Committee before it can proceed to a full floor vote.

data.title: Iran claims oil exports have not been interrupted for a single day.
data.description: Iranian Oil Minister Mohsen Paknead said today (April 14) that Iran's oil sales have been good since the outbreak of the military conflict with the United States and Israel, and part of the revenue will be used to repair the damage to industry caused by the wartime attacks. Paknead said that Iranian oil industry workers have maintained the operation of various facilities during the conflict, ensuring that oil exports "have not been interrupted for even a day," including key export hubs such as Kharg Island. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Shanghai Aunt Shares Surge Over 11% on Hong Kong Stock Exchange
data.description: Shares of Shanghai Aunt (02589.HK) experienced a significant increase, rising over 11% on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. According to Jin10, the stock saw a sharp upward movement, attracting attention from investors. The reasons behind this surge remain under analysis as market participants assess the factors contributing to the stock's performance.

data.title: Sweden's Central Bank Vice Governor Commits to Low Inflation and Financial Stability
data.description: Sweden's Central Bank Vice Governor, Per Jansson, emphasized the institution's commitment to maintaining low and stable inflation, a stable financial system, and the ability to facilitate payments during crises and wartime. According to Jin10, Jansson highlighted the importance of these objectives in ensuring economic resilience and stability. The central bank's focus remains on safeguarding the financial system while addressing challenges posed by global uncertainties.

data.title: Nasdaq to Include SanDisk in Nasdaq 100 Index by 2026
data.description:
On April 14, Nasdaq announced that SanDisk (SNDK) will be officially included in the Nasdaq 100 Index components before the market opens on April 20, 2026. According to BlockBeats, this announcement has significantly boosted SNDK's stock performance, with the price rising over 14% since Monday, reaching a new all-time high. On the Hyperliquid platform, SNDK contracts surged above $980, marking a 24-hour increase of 13.8%.

Hyperinsight monitoring indicates that the strengthening market has turned on-chain long positions profitable. Notably, a trader known as "CBB," who previously focused on shorting U.S. stocks, shifted to long positions in SNDK starting April 6. This has become their primary holding, with a current position size of $6.73 million and an unrealized profit of $730,000, making them the largest long position holder in SNDK on Hyperliquid.
